title: regalia dura
intro: Regalia dura, also known as Rollinia deltitidia, is a tropical plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, characterized by its yellow or orange fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Regalia dura include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Regalia dura can be prepared as a tea, juice, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
